draft.conclusion: I found the main concern but have not completed the evidence, impact, fix, or test analysis.

findings.problem: field.get_prep_value() serializes the value with json.dumps and the field's encoder, so readonly display shows valid JSON (double quotes) instead of Python repr. get_prep_value json.dumps 双引号 合法 JSON valid json 序列化 JSON

Values that json.dumps cannot serialize fall back to display_for_value via the TypeError handler instead of breaking the admin change page. TypeError 回退 fallback 无法序列化 不可序列化 serialize fail unserializable
